title: Runtime Demo Scenario
mission_statement: Turn the military-style LLM framework into a tool-gated runtime demo.

intent.purpose: Show how mission intake, tasking, policy, approval, evidence, SITREP, and AAR connect.
success_conditions: Red tool request is blocked until approval.
failure_conditions: A high-risk action executes without approval.
Evidence and AAR are not linked to the mission.
